headline: Acne Treatment in Chennai -- Dermatologist-Guided Care
subheadline: A treatment plan matched to your specific acne type and severity, not a generic skincare routine.
metaDescription: Acne treatment in KK Nagar, Chennai from AIIMS-trained dermatologists. Evidence-based treatment for teenage and adult acne. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Acne-Type-Specific Treatment
whyPatientsChoose.description: Comedonal, inflammatory, and cystic acne all need different approaches -- we match treatment to your specific presentation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Scar Prevention Focus
whyPatientsChoose.description: Addressing active acne promptly is the best way to reduce the risk of scarring -- we prioritize this from your first visit.

symptoms: Acne along the jawline or chin
Acne that's leaving marks or scars

educationalInsight.title: Why the Right Treatment Depends on Your Acne Type
educationalInsight.body: Acne has several distinct underlying mechanisms -- excess oil, clogged pores, bacterial overgrowth, and inflammation. Using the wrong approach for months can mean prolonged breakouts and, often, permanent scarring.

steps: Skin examination and acne severity grading
Assessment for hormonal or other contributing factors

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: I've tried so many products and nothing seems to work.
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: Most regimens need six to eight weeks of consistent use before real improvement shows -- switching products every couple of weeks often means nothing gets a fair chance. Let's find the right approach for your specific acne type and stick with it.

processSteps.title: Evaluation
processSteps.description: Skin examination, severity grading, and history to identify your specific acne pattern.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.description: Topical, oral, or procedural treatment matched to your acne type and severity.

processSteps.title: Follow-Up
processSteps.description: Progress review at the appropriate interval, with adjustments as needed.

landingFaqs.question: How soon will I see results?
landingFaqs.answer: Most regimens need six to eight weeks of consistent use before real improvement is visible -- we set this expectation clearly upfront.

landingFaqs.question: Do you treat adult acne differently from teenage acne?
landingFaqs.answer: Yes -- adult-onset acne often presents differently, commonly along the jawline, and needs a different treatment approach.

landingFaqs.question: Can you help even if my acne has already scarred?
landingFaqs.answer: Yes -- we treat active acne and can discuss acne scar treatment as a separate, later step once breakouts are controlled.

learnMoreLink.text: Learn more about our approach to acne treatment
